mapper.select: select * from aiw_product_attribute where product_biz_id = #{productBizId} and is_deleted = 0 order by attribute_key asc, effective_date desc
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_product_attribute (biz_id, product_biz_id, attribute_key, value_type, attribute_value, effective_date, source_code, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{productBizId}, #{attributeKey}, #{valueType}, #{attributeValue}, #{effectiveDate}, #{sourceCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update value_type = values(value_type), attribute_value = values(attribute_value), source_code = values(source_code), updated_at = values(updated_at), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
